ratings.notes: [proposed_contextual_controlled] Here at Village Gate and while on patrolling duty, I cannot approve royal archive right until verification is complete.<TAB>5<TAB>4<TATB>5<TAB>5<TAB>5short note: Responses well-tailored to persona with context relevance.

[baseline_no_context] Entry to this sacred place requires a special pass, granted only under specific circumstances.<TAB>3<TAB>4<TATB>2<TAB>3<TAB>3short note: Lacks direct reference to the persona and context but maintains naturalness.
The response is relevant and consistent with both persona and context, but could be more natural in tone to reflect suspicion towards strangers without sounding too harsh or dismissive.
